result.summary: verdict: changes_requested — 2 findings. Auth token validation paths covered; one missing null-guard on Bearer token header parsing.

findings.issue: auth token header parser does not null-check the Authorization value
findings.fix: return early when header is absent rather than dereferencing

findings.issue: missing test for empty bearer token edge case
findings.fix: add test case with Authorization: Bearer (no value)

next_actions: developer: add null-guard + test case before next review round
